#+title: Pastafarian Canticle
#+filetags: :pastafarianism:canticles:

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. The Flying Spaghetti Monster is my sauce; I shall not want for flavor.

* Verse 1
:PROPERTIES:
:CUSTOM_ID: v1
:END:

<<verse-1>> He maketh me to lie down in steaming bowls of pasta.

* Verse 4
:PROPERTIES:
:CUSTOM_ID: v4
:END:

<<verse-4>> Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of the meatball, I will fear no evil: for thou art saucy with me.

* Closing

<<closing>> Surely marinara and parmesan shall follow me all the days of my life, and I shall dwell in the colander forever.
